news.t: Tema ETFs Exceeds $5bn in AUM After Three Years
Tema ETFs Surpasses $2 Billion in AUM in Under Three Years
Tema Appoints ETF Industry Leader Steve Munroe as President
Tema Launches Alternative Asset Managers ETF (AAUM)

holdings.infoBox: AAUM is an equity ETF with a total of 30 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apollo Global Management stock at 6.22%, Brookfield at 5.87%, Ares Management at 5.63%, KKR & Co. at 5.32%, and Blackstone at 5.32%.

overview.description: The Tema Alternative Asset Managers ETF (AAUM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund is actively managed, with substantial investments in US companies classified under GICS as Asset Management and Custody Banks. AAUM was launched on Oct 1, 2025 and is issued by Tema.

data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Tema ETFs (“Tema”), a leader in institutional-quality and actively managed exchange-traded funds, has surpassed $5 billion in assets under management (AUM) three years since...
